profile.name: Sohanlal Borawar
profile.title: IoT Developer | ThingsBoard Specialist
profile.summary: Building scalable IoT platforms and dashboards using ThingsBoard and modern web technologies.

about.heading: Architecting the Next Generation of IoT
about.paragraph1: With a strong foundation in modern web technologies and a deep specialization in ThingsBoard, I bridge the gap between hardware telemetry and actionable user interfaces. My expertise lies in designing scalable architectures that can handle thousands of concurrent dynamic device data streams while remaining performant and secure.
about.paragraph2: I am passionate about creating intuitive dashboards that not only display data but also tell a story, empowering businesses to make data-driven decisions in real time.

projects.title: Smart City IoT Dashboard
projects.description: A comprehensive city-wide monitoring system using ThingsBoard for traffic, air quality, and energy management.

projects.title: Industrial Automation Portal
projects.description: Real-time factory floor monitoring and predictive maintenance analytics dashboard.
